title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.223 - Reimbursement for ambulance service to be based on mileage
text:
208.223.  Reimbursement for ambulance service to be based on mileage. — Reimbursement for ambulance services provided under this chapter shall be made based on mileage calculations from the point of pick up to the destination.
(L. 2009 S.B. 307 § 1)
